title: Tests for formatter and conversation memory
acceptance_criteria: Hspec tests for formatContextForLLM (output is valid markdown with expected sections)
Hspec tests for countContextTokens (approximate token count matches expectations)
Hspec tests for formatNodeCompact, formatEdgeCompact (compact output within token budget)
Hspec tests for addConversationNode (node added to graph, edges created)
Hspec tests for queryConversations (finds matching conversations from graph)
Hspec tests for ConversationNode JSON round-trip (ToJSON/FromJSON symmetry)
QuickCheck: formatted context token count <= budget for varied inputs
Integration test: save + load conversation file round-trip
